programme.title: Haute Couture Fashion Week
programme.desc: Take your time to enjoy the highest category of high fashion, haute couture, to see the newest masterpieces, one-of-a-kind handcrafted garments with some pieces taking weeks or even months to complete.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Powerful Keys To Unlocking God's Word
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Lis Eberle's story is an inspiring example of how perseverance and strength can carry someone through an unstable and life threatening situation that, in her case, led to a miraculous outcome.

programme.title: Fly Away Home
programme.desc: The story of a 13-year-old girl who goes to live with her estranged, eccentric father following the death of her mother. She finds renewed happiness when she adopts an orphaned flock of baby geese.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.desc: Exploring answers to life's most difficult questions and recorded on college campus across the United States, Cliffe Knechtle engages with students and professors, to give real answers to tough questions about Christianity.

programme.title: Two for the Win
programme.desc: A world champion ski racer and local ski instructor find romance on the slopes as he returns home and prepares for the biggest race of his life.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Vlad Dracula - The Man, The Myth, The Monster?
programme.desc: Depending on the author, a hero can become a villain. Much is the case with the real-historical Vlad Dracula. FAKE NEWS turned him into a monster.

programme.title: Welcome to Hope
programme.desc: John gets his life back on track thanks to Jude and Pastor Luke, until an unthinkable family tragedy occurs.

programme.title: Smoketown
programme.sub-title: He Won_t Be Coming Home This Time
programme.desc: In the wake of a mysterious and shocking murder, three unique people - an Assistant Chief of Police, a reporter, and a teenage girl - are empowered to fight for the city's poorest neighbourhood.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Join pastor Dr David Jeremiah as he challenges viewers to take hold of the truths of God's Word for themselves and to apply it to the daily circumstances in their own life, by presenting God's truth in clear and practical applications.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: A librarian with a sharp mind for murder, Aurora Teagarden is known around her small town as a master sleuth. When her friend Jane unexpectedly dies, she also leaves a troubling murder mystery haunting her neighbourhood.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: Autumn in the Vineyard
programme.desc: When Frankie Baldwin and Nate Deluca both have a claim to ownership of Sorrento Farm, they are forced to divide the vineyard right down the middle and work the fields alongside each other.

programme.title: Summer in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Frankie and Nate are gearing up for the town's largest event. When an issue with the new wine puts things in jeopardy, the relationship and the partnership will be put to test.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, relatable, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastor Peter Mortlock teaches on faith. He encourages us to pause on the wonders of creation. When you see it, you get to understand how God is well able to do all that we ask and exceedingly abundantly more.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Join pastor Dr David Jeremiah as he challenges viewers to take hold of the truths of God's Word for themselves and to apply it to the daily circumstances in their own life, by presenting God's truth in clear and practical applications.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Promise To Heal/A Life of Service
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: Why Haven_t My Prayers Been Answered? Part 1
programme.desc: Dive in and discover what the different types of prayer are, and why it is important to pray with holy hands, free from unresolved anger, doubt, and bitterness.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Powerful Keys To Unlocking God's Word
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: Hunt for the Labyrinth Killer
programme.desc: An ace ADA works with a driven cop to catch Daedalus, a serial killer infamous for luring his victims to their deaths with elaborate traps.

programme.title: No One Would Tell
programme.desc: Laura is happy for her daughter Sarah when she begins to date the popular boy from school, Rob. It is only a matter of time before Rob begins to reveal his darker, more possessive side.

programme.title: House of Deadly Lies
programme.desc: A stay at home mother takes in her struggling best friend to help her through a tough time, but soon secrets are revealed that could break her family apart and put everyone in danger.

programme.title: Killer Vacation
programme.desc: Jake and his pregnant girlfriend, Lindsey, visit a resort, only to find his soon-to-be-ex there. As tensions rise, someone wants to ensure Lindsey never leaves.

programme.title: One Night Stand Murder
programme.desc: Alyssa wakes up in a home that's not hers and discovers a dead body. With no memory of how she got there and no idea of who the body belongs to, Alyssa tries to piece together what happened.

programme.title: The Boarding School Murders
programme.desc: Foster teen Frankie attends an elite Swiss boarding school. One of her classmates is murdered and everyone is quick to blame Frankie. She must prove innocence before becoming a prime suspect.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, is caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him after a prison escape.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris
programme.desc: An American exchange student in Paris falls in love with her host family's handsome son, but when she witnesses a murder, the couple must go on the run to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Cyberstalker
programme.desc: An online stalker torments a young woman.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: There's a New Killer in Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. However, one of her friends starts to suspect that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Seeds of Yesterday
programme.desc: The saga of the tormented Dollangangers comes to an end where the family continues to coexist miserably.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: Who Is Killing The Cheerleaders?
programme.desc: Ellie, a former cheerleader, returns to her high school as a teacher 10 years after she was nearly killed in a series of brutal slayings on the squad.

programme.title: Petals on the Wind
programme.desc: A decade after Cathy, Christopher, and Carrie escaped from their grandparents' attic, the family attempt to put their past behind them, but soon discover certain secrets can't be left behind.

programme.title: The Venice Murders
programme.desc: When her new roommate goes missing in Italy, an art student teams up with her eccentric aunt to save her friend and bring the kidnapper to justice.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: God's Grace: The Sheila Johnson Story
programme.desc: Based on the life of Sheila Johnson who was diagnosed with stage IV metastatic breast cancer and later found an advocacy group to support Black women and men diagnosed with the disease.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: Aurora finds a member of her crime buff group killed in a manner that resembles the crime the club was about to discuss. As other brutal 'copycat' killings follow, Aurora will have to uncover the person behind the game.

programme.title: Two for the Win
programme.desc: A world champion ski racer and local ski instructor find romance on the slopes as he returns home and prepares for the biggest race of his life.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Powerful Keys To Unlocking God's Word
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Diane Louise Jordan discovers more about the wonders of the universe on a visit to Cambridge. She also meets leading scientists, including the Astronomer, Royal Lord Martin Rees.

programme.title: HumanKind
programme.desc: At New Hope Care in Brisbane, Emma Broadley is redefining the concept of family. By creating a welcoming space for those who often feel invisible, she's building a community where strangers become kin.

programme.title: The Insanity of God
programme.desc: The Insanity of God is the true story of missionaries Nik and Ruth Ripken. After the death of their son, this ordinary couple journeys into the depths of the persecuted church, asking the question: Is Jesus worth it?

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: Why Haven_t My Prayers Been Answered? Part 1
programme.desc: Dive in and discover what the different types of prayer are, and why it is important to pray with holy hands, free from unresolved anger, doubt, and bitterness.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: The Insanity of God
programme.desc: The Insanity of God is the true story of missionaries Nik and Ruth Ripken. After the death of their son, this ordinary couple journeys into the depths of the persecuted church, asking the question: Is Jesus worth it?

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: The heart of the weekly teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: Noble
programme.desc: Christina Noble overcomes the harsh difficulties of her childhood in Ireland to discover her destiny on the streets of Saigon. A true story.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Powerful Keys To Unlocking God's Word Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Dispatching the Grand Duchess' Disrespectful Desserts
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness always seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth confronts an imposing figure from her past with Nathan's support. Rosemary helps Lee navigate a new leadership role. Lucas struggles to find bidders for his resort project.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Day of Discovery
programme.desc: This weekly, documentary-style series offers a view of current and historical events, biblical prophecy, and contemporary issues of importance to those of the Christian faith.

programme.title: The Venice Murders
programme.desc: When her new roommate goes missing in Italy, an art student teams up with her eccentric aunt to save her friend and bring the kidnapper to justice.

programme.title: I Was Octomom
programme.desc: In 2009 Natalie Suleman gives birth to eight children with the help of IVF, only to have her life torn apart and her identity rebranded by the media.

programme.title: Am I A Serial Killer?
programme.desc: A teenage girl visits her mum on death row and gets lured into a dangerous trap to take the fall for her mother's crimes.

programme.title: A Daughter's Nightmare
programme.desc: Soon after her father's death, college freshman Ariel learns her mother, Dana, has met Adam, a seemingly well-meaning and charming man at a grief support group.

programme.title: Girl in the Basement
programme.desc: Sara, a vibrant teen, was looking forward to her 18th birthday so she could move away from her controlling father. But before she could even blow out the candles, her world became extremely dark.

programme.title: Who Killed JonBenet?
programme.desc: Revisit the infamous murder of pint-sized beauty queen JonBenet Ramsey and the lurid details that captivated a nation.

programme.title: Stalkers
programme.desc: Frustrated with the judicial system's indifference towards stalking cases, A.D.A Julia Winston is determined to establish a task force charged with tracking and prosecuting predators.

programme.title: Single Black Female 2
programme.desc: Three years after narrowly escaping the murderous clutches of her half-sister Simone, Monica is ready for a fresh start in Seattle as host of the city's number one prime-time investigative program.

programme.title: Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: Grisly serial killer Keith Hunter Jesperson taunts authorities with scribbled confessions bearing a smiley face at the scenes of his crimes. Based on a true story.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Hidden Jewel
programme.desc: Ruby struggles to find a happy life with Beau Andreas, the true father of Pearl, and to protect their daughter. Sheltered from sorrow, Pearl thrives in the sunshine of a loving home.

programme.title: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: An attorney who lived in LA during the Night Stalker's murder spree attempts to clear the name of an inmate who she believes was wrongly accused of the crimes.

programme.title: Beaches
programme.desc: The serendipitous meeting of two young girls on the Venice Boardwalk, who, although worlds apart in lifestyle, embark on an unexpected and lifelong friendship.

programme.title: Oscar Pistorius: Blade Runner Killer
programme.desc: The true story of the sprint runner and his rise to fame as a Paralympian gold medallist. It all shattered one evening when four bullets were fired and his beautiful girlfriend's life was taken.

programme.title: The Killing Game
programme.desc: Ten years after her daughter's murder, Eve is contacted by a man claiming to be the child's killer, who taunts her with mysterious clues and threats to kill again.

programme.title: Vanished in Yosemite
programme.desc: While on vacation in Yosemite, sisters Katrina and Jennifer meet the perfect guy Rick. Katrina is certain she has met Mr Right, however, when Katrina goes missing, Jennifer suspects kidnapping.

programme.title: Mommy Meanest
programme.desc: A teenage girl is relentlessly cyber-bullied, only to find out the horrific texts are from her own mother.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Hidden Jewel
programme.desc: Ruby struggles to find a happy life with Beau Andreas, the true father of Pearl, and to protect their daughter. Sheltered from sorrow, Pearl thrives in the sunshine of a loving home.

programme.title: Day of Discovery
programme.desc: This weekly, documentary-style series offers a view of current and historical events, biblical prophecy, and contemporary issues of importance to those of the Christian faith.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Diane Louise Jordan discovers more about the wonders of the universe on a visit to Cambridge. She also meets leading scientists, including the Astronomer, Royal Lord Martin Rees.

programme.title: The Insanity of God
programme.desc: The Insanity of God is the true story of missionaries Nik and Ruth Ripken. After the death of their son, this ordinary couple journeys into the depths of the persecuted church, asking the question: Is Jesus worth it?

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: Meet the founder of the African Methodist Episcopal Church and learn how he faithfully served God in the face of discrimination and plague.

programme.title: Ancestors: New Testament
programme.sub-title: Mary and Martha, Syrophoenician Woman, Sheep
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from. Hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Acclaimed speaker & TV presenter Gary Kent has produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events, historical places & natural health. His passion is to share the good news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: Helping Hands TV celebrates the people making the world a better place. This inspiring and uplifting program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: After being stood up, Abbey gets inspired to open her heart in a letter, put it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: Becky battles a personal struggle while Gary is away. Tre follows a lead in Dallas.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Life Hacks: Pocket tips from the Book of Proverbs Pt4
programme.desc: Marc explores the wisdom of the Book of Proverbs looking at the wisdom that God has provided, so that we can observe it and put it into practice in our day to day lives.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Powerful Keys To Unlocking God's Word Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: After being stood up, Abbey gets inspired to open her heart in a letter, put it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out.

programme.title: Valentine in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Frankie & Nate have just gotten engaged when Frankie's cousin & Nate's brother tell them that they're getting married on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Unveiled
programme.desc: Emma travels to Italy to teach and research a wedding veil said to bring its owner love. While there, she meets Paolo, the son of a local lace-making family.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, relatable, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Powerful Keys To Unlocking God's Word Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have a few questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: At The Table is where we share, laugh and dream. Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration. Which direction are you heading?

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: Why Haven_t My Prayers Been Answered? Part 1
programme.desc: Dive in and discover what the different types of prayer are, and why it is important to pray with holy hands, free from unresolved anger, doubt, and bitterness.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: With news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, The 700 Club shares powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Hidden Jewel
programme.desc: Ruby struggles to find a happy life with Beau Andreas, the true father of Pearl, and to protect their daughter. Sheltered from sorrow, Pearl thrives in the sunshine of a loving home.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: Model Kara Woods begins to get disturbing messages from one of her fans, causing her to seek help from a security influencer. Things are fine until Kara's stalker shows up in person.

programme.title: Britney Ever After
programme.desc: The true story of Britney Jean Spears, one of the bestselling teenage music artists of all-time, whose dating life and public emotional breakdowns were the subjects of a worldwide media frenzy.

programme.title: Blonde and Blonder
programme.desc: When two dimwitted, blonde bombshells are mistaken for the underworld's most cunning assassins, they are approached with a lucrative contract to take out the head of the Chinese mafia.

programme.title: How to Live Your Best Death
programme.desc: Hoping to go after her dreams, Kristin hires Ashley, a life coach who promises to help her reach her full potential. However, things take a turn when unconventional methods start to wreak havoc,

programme.title: An Amish Murder
programme.desc: A woman returns to the Amish farming community of her youth, but her peace is shattered when a murder investigation exposes a dark secret that could destroy her.

programme.title: Sins of My Husband
programme.desc: After police kill serial killer Tony Dandridge, his wife, Katherine, denies knowledge of his crimes. But when a victim's mother supports Katherine, it turns into a dangerous game of truth and lies.

programme.title: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: After a near-fatal house fire, Natalie and Loughlin, a struggling married couple, are manipulated by an obsessive firefighter named Jack, who schemes to pit the couple against each other.

programme.title: Woman with the Red Lipstick
programme.desc: Lucy and her boyfriend assume fake names and roleplay meetings for the first time. Later, Lucy sees a news report about a missing persons case where the victim has the same name.

programme.title: Secret Love Triangle
programme.desc: When Jessica is falsely charged with the murder of her friend's husband, she escapes from jail and goes on the run with her husband Matt in an attempt to clear her name.

programme.title: Smart Home Killer
programme.desc: After surviving an attack, a mother moves with her daughter into a smart house. As strange glitches and events occur, she realises she's not the only one in control.

programme.title: The Neighbours Are Watching
programme.desc: When a handsome neighbour moves in across the street, a single woman trying to escape her past in the new subdivision believes she has witnessed her new neighbour committing a grisly murder.

programme.title: Ice Road Killer
programme.desc: Follows Helen and her daughter Lauren, who go on a trip to an isolated cabin in the cold north and meet a hitchhiker who actually is a thief trying to evade a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: Searching for Neverland
programme.desc: Chronicles the intimate moments between Jackson and his children, and documents the professional turbulence that engulfed Jackson, eventually forcing him back to rehearsals for an ill-fated tour.

programme.title: Secrets of Eden
programme.desc: A small-town minister is accused of the deaths of two beloved parishioners when evidence surfaces that the family wasn't quite as perfect as they appeared.

programme.title: Cyberstalker
programme.desc: An online stalker torments a young woman.

programme.title: The Perfect Teacher
programme.desc: When spoiled, beautiful high-schooler Devon sets her sights on her handsome teacher, she won't take no for an answer.

programme.desc: The latest highlights, reaction and analysis of the biggest sport stories from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: With news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, The 700 Club shares powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Promise To Heal/A Life of Service
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: After being stood up, Abbey gets inspired to open her heart in a letter, put it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Spoiling the Schemes of Luxor Spawndroth pt.1
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: Holy Moly turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions to help children immediately relate to the stories.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: This Changed Everything
programme.desc: Celebrates the fruits of the Reformation while exploring difficult questions about the cost of division: Could schism have been avoided? What did Jesus really mean when He prayed for His followers to be 'one'?

programme.title: Outback Rider
programme.desc: Country music artist Steve Grace rides his Harley from Byron Bay to the Birdsville Hotel telling the stories of those he encounters. Features breathtaking visuals, confronting interviews & the harsh conditions of living on the land.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: The Ministry of Jesus in Northern Israel
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Acclaimed speaker & TV presenter Gary Kent has produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events, historical places & natural health. His passion is to share the good news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Powerful Keys To Unlocking God's Word Pt 3 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Atheism cannot account for love. Without God, there can be no love.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: Faith, Hope & Love
programme.desc: Recent divorcee Faith enters a dance contest to save her dance studio, where she meets Jimmy Hope and rediscovers her faith and dreams.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Promise To Heal/A Life of Service
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK Theologian, Cambridge Scholar, Pastor and Bible Teacher David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: Flip that Romance
programme.desc: Jules and Lance once flipped a property together, but broke up in the process. Now rivals, renovating opposite sides of a duplex can they flip their romance as well?

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Powerful Keys To Unlocking God's Word Pt 3 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Night Owls and Early Birds is a new topical Bible study show from the creators of Owlegories. Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: We can see In the old testament there were certain anointings that was used for a leper, priest and another that was used for a king. We will discover how rich these anointing were what they accomplished.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: In business you will need to be engaged with others to build success. Whether it's suppliers, logistics, accountants, consultants, lawyers or something else, there will be times that you need help from others.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as Nick and Yvette Wynne, the motorcycle missionaries, traverse 20 000 km in 3 months riding around Australia.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Mike explores the ups and downs of San Francisco on a classic cable car and digs into a crab feast fit for King Neptune.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Martin Luther - The First Viral Post
programme.desc: In this episode learn about 'Martin Luther' the man behind the world's first VIRAL POST that brought about one of the biggest world-changing events of all time - The Protestant Reformation.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Join pastor Dr David Jeremiah as he challenges viewers to take hold of the truths of God's Word for themselves and to apply it to the daily circumstances in their own life, by presenting God's truth in clear and practical applications.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Perfect Teacher
programme.desc: When spoiled, beautiful high-schooler Devon sets her sights on her handsome teacher, she won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: If There Be Thorns
programme.desc: With Christopher and Cathy Dollanganger living together as man and wife, Cathy's two sons are unaware of the incestuous nature of their parents' relationship.

programme.title: The Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: Mary, a dutiful preacher's wife and mother of three, becomes the prime suspect in her husband's murder. What went on behind this perfect family's closed doors? Based on a true story.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: Emma is a young Amish woman who leads a double life by sneaking out to clubs to flirt and have fun. However, when she accidentally witnesses a murder, her life and community get thrown into peril.

programme.title: Wife Stalker
programme.desc: Joanna's obsessive fantasy of a perfect life with Leo shatters, forcing her to confront harsh reality and the truth about their relationship, with dire consequences.

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: A woman stumbles into the middle of a kidnapping while stranded at a small-town airport on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: I Was Octomom
programme.desc: In 2009 Natalie Suleman gives birth to eight children with the help of IVF, only to have her life torn apart and her identity rebranded by the media.

programme.title: How She Caught a Killer
programme.desc: Inspired by the real story of a female detective who went undercover to catch The Route 40 Killer.

programme.title: Waking Up To Danger
programme.desc: A young mother picks up the pieces after a horrible accident damages her memory. She soon suspects her husband's indiscretions are what caused her suffering and that her family is in danger.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Ruby
programme.desc: In the heart of the bayou, Ruby Landry lives a simple, happy life. The only family Ruby has ever known are her loving guardian, Grandmere Catherine, and her drunken Grandpere Jack.

programme.title: Girl in the Box
programme.desc: In 1977, Colleen Stan doesn't think twice when she hitchhikes and is picked up by young couple Cameron and Janice Hooker. But the life she knows is ripped away when they abduct her.

programme.title: The Beach House Murders
programme.desc: A lonely female novelist becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.

programme.title: Kidnapping in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust a hiking guide to take them on an off trail adventure.

programme.title: A Roommate to Die For
programme.desc: After a nasty break-up, Faith needs a new roommate to supplement the rent and finds that something very strange is going on with the tenant who decides to move in.

programme.title: Nightmare School Moms
programme.desc: Two mothers battle to see which of their overachieving daughters will be accepted to a prestigious university. However, when one of their methods quickly spirals out of control, the games turn deadly.

programme.title: Greed: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: When interior decorator Zuri Maxwell meets a handsome benefactor and entrepreneur, she compromises the values and morals that should guide her, in an effort to be part of his world.

programme.desc: While preparing to race Doc (No.2), Murder Nova (No.1) does a test hit on the street that draws the attention of the local authorities.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: One Way Diesel Performance transform a 2022 F-450 into a lifted, six-door mega cab, and Wide Open Garage build a one-of-one '90s Chevy race truck.

programme.title: Flipping RVs
programme.desc: Justin and Anna trek buy a rundown 1958 Oasis from Justin's brother. What should be an easy flip goes awry when they discover it needs a complete renovation.

programme.title: Faster with Newbern and Cotten
programme.desc: The guys convert their motorcycle-engine-powered '72 Honda Z600 coupe named Bozo into a micro sprint-inspired dirt-track ripper.

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: Dave and Kev have been to may auctions but this a first where they auction off one of their CF1s at Mecum's biggest event, while searching for a deal.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels
programme.desc: Dave Stotts takes us on his most exciting adventure yet as he tells the story of Jesus from the locations recorded in the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing their faith through music.

programme.title: What's Cooking with Young & Free
programme.desc: Join Young & Free in the kitchen as they serve up a feast of music videos and a side of laughs.

programme.title: OK TV
programme.desc: Brendon and Cathie have poured their 30 years of experience with kids in schools and in ministry and the great goals of the local church into a energetic show that will engage the next generation.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have a few questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey.

programme.title: TV One Life
programme.desc: Between the humour, music and unfiltered ministry, the message is clear, "God can change your life"! Fasten your seatbelts for this roller coaster ride of a show!

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Modern culture has come to accept sexual imagery for the purpose of selling and influencing people: causing social, psychological and relational impacts. Awareness is paramount to avoid normalising this culture.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth confronts an imposing figure from her past with Nathan's support. Rosemary helps Lee navigate a new leadership role. Lucas struggles to find bidders for his resort project.

programme.title: HumanKind
programme.desc: At New Hope Care in Brisbane, Emma Broadley is redefining the concept of family. By creating a welcoming space for those who often feel invisible, she's building a community where strangers become kin.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: A Fantail Journey
programme.desc: This series showcases a variety of uniquely Christian Kiwi content produced at Fantail Studios. Jared shares his heart behind them and the call that God has for each of us in sharing testimonies.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Powerful Keys To Unlocking God's Word Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Promise To Heal/A Life of Service
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth confronts an imposing figure from her past with Nathan's support. Rosemary helps Lee navigate a new leadership role. Lucas struggles to find bidders for his resort project.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Legacy
programme.desc: This is the third instalment of the enchanting trilogy about three college friends - Tracy, Avery and Emma - who share a 19th century wedding veil said to bring whoever possesses it true love.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: Shiloh - The Place where God Once Dwelt
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: We can see In the old testament there were certain anointings that was used for a leper, priest and another that was used for a king. We will discover how rich these anointing were what they accomplished.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: Why Haven_t My Prayers Been Answered? Part 1
programme.desc: Dive in and discover what the different types of prayer are, and why it is important to pray with holy hands, free from unresolved anger, doubt, and bitterness.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Powerful Keys To Unlocking God's Word Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: The Israelites are trying to get to the promised land, but first they must pass through Jericho, which is guarded by the French Peas! Will Joshua listen to God's directions, or will he try to do things his way?

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Life Hacks: Pocket tips from the Book of Proverbs Pt4
programme.desc: Marc explores the wisdom of the Book of Proverbs looking at the wisdom that God has provided, so that we can observe it and put it into practice in our day to day lives.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing their faith.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Blended and step families make up around 1 in 10 families. They face unique challenges that often lead to conflict. So for Steven, entering a relationship with Rachel and her three children required a little patience.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History
programme.desc: Dave Stotts explores the amazing lives of the very first Christians. Using the Book of Acts as a roadmap, Dave travels the Mediterranean region to share the people, places and events that launched the faith.

programme.title: Greed: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: When interior decorator Zuri Maxwell meets a handsome benefactor and entrepreneur, she compromises the values and morals that should guide her, in an effort to be part of his world.

programme.title: Amish Stud: The Eli Weaver Story
programme.desc: A man who calls himself Amish Stud plots with his mistress to murder his wife, to the horror of his conservative Amish community.

programme.title: Lies Between Friends
programme.desc: A wealthy family's world is turned upside down when the 18-year-old daughter of a family friend moves in with them for a few months.

programme.title: The Bear Lake Murders
programme.desc: A sheriff teams up with a detective to uncover the truth behind a series of annual deaths in a resort town. Their investigation leads them to believe that a killer is preying on holidaymakers.

programme.title: Love Triangle Nightmare
programme.desc: Brittany meets a stranger who has everything she wants in a partner and despite being an unknown man as warned by others, she falls in love with him which leads to something tragic.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A reporter who witnesses a brutal murder becomes entangled in a mystery involving conjoined twins who were separated at birth.

programme.title: The Secret Sex Life of a Single Mom
programme.desc: A divorced woman finds sexual liberation through online dating.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: Framed by My Husband
programme.desc: When June's wealthy husband Rick becomes the target of an extortionist who claims he sexually assaulted her, Rick convinces his wife it's an act of revenge.

programme.title: Expecting Amish
programme.desc: When an eventful Rumspringa leads to an unintended pregnancy, Amish teen Hannah must choose between returning to faith and family or beginning a new life elsewhere.

programme.title: Hunt for the Labyrinth Killer
programme.desc: An ace ADA works with a driven cop to catch Daedalus, a serial killer infamous for luring his victims to their deaths with elaborate traps.

programme.title: My Child has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that his biological father is actually her fertility doctor, she teams up with another one of the doctor's clients to bring him to justice.

programme.title: Hoax: The Kidnapping of Sherri Papini
programme.desc: In 2016, Sherri Papini goes for a run and doesn't come home. This Northern California missing person case becomes a national story when she returns and her story about being abducted doesn't add up.

programme.title: Couples Retreat Murder
programme.desc: Becky and Jim head to a remote couple's retreat to try and save their marriage. However, when a guest goes missing and their host is found dead, they start to wonder who else they're trapped with.

programme.title: There's a New Killer in Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. However, one of her friends starts to suspect that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: Over the objection of his girlfriend, Ben agrees to take a job as the live-in manservant to a wealthy businesswoman, Amanda, but quickly realises he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: Spinning Out Of Control
programme.desc: Infatuated and obsessed with a fitness instructor, Natalie hatches a devious plan to eliminate everyone in the young woman's life so she can have her all to herself.

programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Metal Detector
programme.desc: Beep Beep Beep! What an odd contraption! A metal detector has arrived for Ted and he'd like to use it to find his grandad's medal for Nisha's grand exhibition of local historical relics.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Crazy Crockery
programme.desc: Michael is organizing 'Restaurant Night' at school and all the children have been busy cooking and baking special dishes for everyone to come and eat.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Runaway Bees
programme.desc: Dorothy is looking forward to a delivery from Pat - a hive of brand new honey bees! She's got the jars ready for the honey and everything, but keeping swarming bees in a hive is a tricky business!

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.desc: Raa Raa is inspired by his friends to search for his favourite noise in the jingly jangly jungle. The little lion cub and his friends set out to find out what Raa Raa's Favourite Noise could be...

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.desc: Raa Raa and the other animals keep slipping up on banana skins. Where could they have come from? Together the animals clear up the mess and discover who has been littering the jungle.

programme.title: Dew Drop Diaries
programme.sub-title: The Sleepover Save / The Very Hungry Vacuum
programme.desc: Phoebe is concerned that Marcus may be nervous, so Phoebe sets out to make sure he has the best first sleepover ever./ Athena's magical jump rope gets sucked up by a new robot vacuum.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy help the Gabby Cats create unique pieces of artwork in preparation for Baby Box's highly anticipated Meow-seum Day in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Doug Unplugs
programme.sub-title: Bot on the Beach/Bot of the Party
programme.desc: After Doug plugs in to learn what a beach is, Emma takes him for a fun day of activities to teach him why people love going to the beach.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes an attachment that turns Carlita into an ice cream truck. The Gabby Cats all help out to make ice cream, a menu, and a groovy ice cream truck song.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Kelp is introduced to crunchy tacos in Unicorn Land, he must use his bubble sparks to bring them back to his family underwater./ Kelp's unicorn friends are going to teach him Swishbee on land. But it rains.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.sub-title: Dark Park Bark Lark \ The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch team up to get all of Scooch's chores done in time for the Barkapellas Bark in the Park in the Dark concert./ Tag is so excited to join the Sam Whippet's Race Cadets.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Alex realises he's too small to climb onto his new habitat "stage", he feels too small for his dreams- until he hears of a new roller coaster and figures if he can ride it, that'll prove he's a BIG deal!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: When the kids grow over-confident after beginning their training, they decide to intercept a distress call and sneak off without permission, only to land themselves in hot water.

programme.title: Abominable and the Invisible City
programme.desc: With the sudden closing of a local candy shop, NaiNai is busy trying to recreate its famous candied fruit. But after a late-night sugar binge in NaiNai's stash, Peng starts acting strangely.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: Boss comes face to face with his old nemesis;Bug The Pug;after the playgroup parents decide to throw a Puppy Party. Staci creates a "No-Paperworkist" movement to avoid Buddy From HR's constant paperwork.

programme.desc: Sandy is finally old enough to join Grug and Eep for the annual Daddy Daughter Day and Grug couldn't be more excited. But when Sandy struggles to fit in with traditions, Grug has second thoughts.
